title: taraxacum oligophyllum
intro: Taraxacum oligophyllum, also known as the low dandelion or few-leaved dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus that is native to East Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum oligophyllum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
